# nlm — Newsleopard CLI

> Agent-ready CLI for the Newsleopard EDM API and Surenotify transactional messaging API — 34 REST endpoints, 2 MCP utility commands, helper workflows, and structured output.

`nlm` is a Rust CLI that wraps two Newsleopard REST APIs into a single binary. It provides JSON/Table/YAML/CSV output, built-in rate limiting, exponential backoff retry, dry-run safety, multi-profile configuration, MCP tool discovery/invocation, and AI agent skill generation.

REST API coverage is 34 endpoints total: 20 EDM endpoints and 14 Surenotify endpoints. Separately, the CLI also includes 2 MCP utility commands, local config commands, helper workflows, and the `nlm generate-skills` command.

## Install

```bash
npm install -g @newsleopard/nlm-cli   # npm
cargo install nlm-cli                  # cargo
brew install newsleopard/tap/nlm       # homebrew
```

Pre-built binaries: <https://github.com/Newsleopard/nlm-open-cli/releases>

## Quick Start

```bash
nlm config init              # Interactive setup
nlm edm account balance      # Check credits
nlm edm contacts list-groups # List contact groups
```

## Two API Surfaces

| API | Base URL | Auth Variable | Purpose |
|-----|----------|---------------|---------|
| EDM | `api.newsleopard.com` | `NL_EDM_API_KEY` | Bulk email marketing — campaigns, contacts, reports, templates, A/B tests, automations (20 endpoints) |
| Surenotify | `mail.surenotifyapi.com` | `NL_SN_API_KEY` | Transactional email and SMS — send messages, webhooks, domain verification (14 endpoints) |

## Authentication

Config file at `~/.config/nl/config.toml`, or environment variables:

```bash
export NL_EDM_API_KEY="your-edm-key"
export NL_SN_API_KEY="your-sn-key"
export NL_MCP_URL="https://mcp.newsleopard.com"   # Optional MCP host override; nlm uses the /mcp endpoint
```

Precedence: environment variable > CLI flag > profile setting > default.

Multi-profile support: `nlm config set edm_api_key "..." --profile staging`

Use `NL_MCP_URL` when `nlm mcp` should point at a non-default MCP server.

Published MCP endpoints:

- `https://mcp.newsleopard.com/mcp` — JSON-RPC endpoint used by `nlm mcp`
- `https://mcp.newsleopard.com/sse` — SSE endpoint for compatible MCP clients

## Commands

### REST Command Groups (34 endpoints total)

| Group | Description | Endpoints |
|-------|-------------|-----------|
| `nlm edm contacts` | Contact group management (create, list, import, delete) | 6 |
| `nlm edm campaign` | Email campaign management (submit, status, pause, delete) | 5 |
| `nlm edm ab-test` | A/B test campaigns | 2 |
| `nlm edm report` | Campaign reports (list, metrics, export, download) | 4 |
| `nlm edm template` | Template management (list, get) | 2 |
| `nlm edm automation` | Automation script triggers | 1 |
| `nlm edm account` | Account info (balance) | 1 |
| `nlm sn email` | Transactional email (send, query events) | 2 |
| `nlm sn sms` | SMS (send, query events, dedicated numbers) | 3 |
| `nlm sn webhook` | Email webhook CRUD | 3 |
| `nlm sn sms-webhook` | SMS webhook CRUD | 3 |
| `nlm sn domain` | Sender domain verification (create, verify, remove) | 3 |

### Non-REST CLI Groups

| Group | Description | Scope |
|-------|-------------|-------|
| `nlm mcp` | MCP tool discovery and invocation for AI agents | 2 MCP utility commands |
| `nlm config` | Config file management (init, set, get, list, profile) | Local CLI configuration |
| `nlm helper` | Multi-step orchestration workflows | High-level workflows built on multiple API calls |
| `nlm generate-skills` | Generate AI agent skill files in `skills/` | Skill generation utility |

### Helper Workflows

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `nlm helper campaign-send --name N --lists L --subject S ... --wait` | Submit campaign + wait for completion |
| `nlm helper import-and-wait --list-sn SN --file F` | Import contacts + poll until done |
| `nlm helper report-download --sn SN --output FILE` | Export report + download file |
| `nlm helper domain-setup --domain D --auto-verify-after 60` | Create domain + verify DNS |

## Global Flags

```
--format <json|table|yaml|csv>   Output format (default: json, env: NL_FORMAT)
--profile <NAME>                 Config profile (default: default, env: NL_PROFILE)
--dry-run                        Preview request without executing
--page-all                       Stream paginated results as NDJSON
-v, --verbose                    Show request/response details (stackable: -vv)
-q, --quiet                      Errors only
```

Piping behavior: JSON auto-switches to compact when stdout is piped. `--page-all` streams NDJSON (one JSON object per line).

## Output & Scripting

Exit codes: 0 = success, 1 = API error, 2 = validation, 3 = auth/config, 4 = network/rate-limit, 5 = I/O.

Errors are JSON on stderr:

```json
{"error": {"type": "api", "message": "API error 400: [40012] Insufficient balance", "exit_code": 1}}
```

Examples:

```bash
nlm edm report metrics --sns SN1 -q | jq '.open_rate'
nlm edm contacts list-groups --page-all -q | jq 'select(.openedRate > 0.3)'
nlm edm campaign submit --name "March Newsletter" --dry-run
```

## Variable Syntax

EDM and Surenotify use different variable syntaxes — do not mix them:

| API | Syntax | Example |
|-----|--------|---------|
| EDM | `${FIELD_NAME}` | `${NAME}`, `${ORDER_ID}` |
| Surenotify | `{{variable_name}}` | `{{name}}`, `{{order_id}}` |

The CLI detects and warns on cross-use.

## Rate Limits

Built-in token bucket rate limiting:

| Limit | Value | Affected Commands |
|-------|-------|-------------------|
| EDM general | 2 req/s | All `nlm edm` commands |
| Report export | 1 req/10s | `nlm edm report export` |
| SN recipients | 100 per request | `nlm sn email send`, `nlm sn sms send` |

HTTP 429 and 5xx errors are retried with exponential backoff (500ms initial, 30s max, 120s total timeout).

## Key Constraints

- Config file `~/.config/nl/config.toml` has 600 permissions; API keys never appear in stdout
- SMS content must include company name (NCC regulatory requirement)
- Surenotify max 100 recipients per request, 100 chars per variable value

## AI Agent Skills

Run `nlm generate-skills` to generate 35 skill files in `skills/` that teach AI agents how to use every nlm command — covering shared patterns, API groups, helper workflows, recipes, and role-based personas.

- [Install Guide](docs/install.md): Installation instructions for humans and AI agents
- [AI Agent Skills Index](docs/skills.md): Index of 35 generated skill files for agent integration
